title: qbar configuration
description: A single bar object, or an array of bar objects (multi-monitor, top+bottom).

exclusiveZone.description: Reserve screen space for the bar.

popupKeyboardFocus.description: Let popups grab the keyboard (enables Esc-to-close).

baseStyleSheet.description: Optional base CSS loaded before styleSheet (which cascades on top). Omit to disable.

customTools.description: Map of "custom/<name>" to a tool definition.

magnify.description: Hover effect: cosine fisheye (default), sharper parabolic peak, uniform whole-dock scale, or no growth.

indicator.description: Focused-window marker: accent underline (default), round dot, translucent tile behind the icon, or none.

hoverHeight.description: Whole-dock baseline height on hover, px (default 48).

peakHeight.description: Cursor-focused fisheye peak height, px (default round(hoverHeight * 1.5)).

notifications.description: The org.freedesktop.Notifications daemon (CSS-themed toasts). Stop any other daemon (dunst/mako) or set enabled: false.

enabled.description: Own the notification bus name and show toasts. OPT-IN (default false) — enabling displaces dunst/mako. Not hot-reloadable.

styleSheet.description: Dedicated stylesheet for the toasts — separate from the bar theme, like the lock's *-lock.css (e.g. "themes/nord-notify.css"; relative paths resolve against the config dir). Omit to inherit the bar theme's #notification rules.

corner.description: Screen corner the toast stack grows from (default top-right).

maxVisible.description: Cards shown at once; the rest queue (default 5).

timeout.description: Default expiry for normal urgency, ms (default 6000).

timeoutCritical.description: Expiry for critical urgency, ms (default 0 = never; dismissed via the ✕).

width.description: Toast width fallback, px — the CSS `#notifications { width }` wins (default 380).

margin.description: Gap to the screen edges fallback, px — CSS `#notifications { margin }` wins (default 12).

actionButtons.description: Show action buttons on cards; false drops the 'actions' capability too, so probing apps fall back (default true).

inlineReply.description: Inline reply field (KDE extension, Telegram-style); false drops the 'inline-reply' capability (default true).

display.description: Composable display for the CPU/Memory/Network applets.

format.description: Value parts shown beside the always-present graph. "cycle" is a slot the mouse wheel cycles. Empty list = graph only.

text.description: Literal label shown by the "text"/"cycle" parts.

source.description: Path to a runtime QML widget (.qml), used INSTEAD of exec. Loaded from disk (not compiled in); resolved relative to the config dir. The widget may import "qrc:/qbar" (CssRect/CssText/CssEnable) and read cssTheme/theme/the models; declare `property string toolId` to receive its id and read its own customTools entry.

return-type.description: Omit for plain text; "json" for the waybar object format.
